omitted_declarations.policy_reference: A third party that acquires us or all or most of our business.When we sell or acquire any business, enter into a merger, form a partnership, or sell part or all of our assets, we may disclose your information to potential buyers of the business.In such cases, we will always require potential buyers to comply with this privacy policy.
